iran_nuke.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 100. 440kg HEU still under IAEA monitoring. Hidden HEU in underground facility unresolved. Araghchi confirms stockpile. No diplomatic path. Nuclear test not conducted but breakout capability remains.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 100. Coalition isolation deepens: Germany, Japan, Italy, Australia all refuse Hormuz escort. EU refuses expansion. Trump lashes at NATO allies. Brent spiked $106 before settling $100. Tehran power grid struck. Kataib Hezbollah commander killed. 13 US troops dead. 2,000+ killed in war (mostly Iran/Lebanon). Iran FM still rejects ceasefire.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 100. Ground invasion expanded to MULTIPLE AXES in southern Lebanon. 1M+ displaced, 886 killed (incl 107 children). 5 Western leaders urge restraint but ignored. Hezbollah 210+ rockets since March 2. Fears of prolonged occupation.

turkey.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 79. Iranian refugees flooding into Turkey by train (airspace restricted). NATO strain deepening as allies refuse Hormuz involvement. Multiple NATO missile intercepts over Turkey unresolved.

india.notes: Day 19 00:00 - ELEVATED 25. India evacuates nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 87. Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen. No direct ME intervention yet. NATO alliance fracturing over Hormuz benefits Russia strategically.

china.notes: Day 19 02:00 - CRITICAL 46. Trump DELAYS China visit — 'war going on.' Hormuz coalition demand was precondition for Xi summit, now shelved. Diplomatic track frozen. Blockade rehearsals continue. No improvement in de-escalation prospects.

north_korea.notes: Day 19 00:00 - IMMINENT 78. 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. Exploiting US security gap in ME. No new signals since update.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 100. Kharkiv offensive continues. 97 drones previously launched. Biden Kyiv visit completed. No ceasefire framework. West distracted by ME war.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 19 02:00 - IMMINENT 100. Kabul hospital strike aftermath. UNSC resolution passed. China mediating. Open war continues. Limited new data due to search rate limits.

top_signals: BREAKING: Israel expands Lebanon ground invasion to MULTIPLE AXES — 1M+ displaced, 886 killed
Trump delays China summit — 'We've got a war going on, I need to be here'
Germany, Japan, Italy, Australia ALL refuse Trump's Hormuz coalition request
EU refuses to expand maritime operations — Kallas: 'This is not Europe's war'
Brent crude briefly spiked to $106/barrel before settling near $100
US-Israeli strikes target Tehran power grid — electricity knocked out for hours
Kataib Hezbollah senior commander Abu Ali al-Askari killed in US strike
13 US service members now confirmed dead since war began
1,348 Iranian civilians killed; Iran tells UNSC of toll
Trump lashes at NATO allies: '40 years protecting you and you won't help?'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: Israel expands Lebanon ground invasion to multiple axes
latest_news.text: Israeli ground forces advance across multiple axes in southern Lebanon. Defense Minister Katz confirms 'ground maneuver.' 1M+ displaced, 886 killed. Guardian warns of 'prolonged occupation.'

latest_news.headline: Trump delays China visit due to war — 'I need to be here'
latest_news.text: Trump asks Xi to reschedule March 31 summit. 'We've got a war going on.' Was conditioning visit on Chinese warship contribution to Hormuz escort.

latest_news.headline: Germany, Japan, Italy, Australia refuse Hormuz coalition
latest_news.text: German Defense Minister: 'This is not our war; we did not start it.' Japan, Italy, Australia also decline. EU's Kallas: 'This is not Europe's war.'

latest_news.headline: Brent crude hits $106 before settling near $100
latest_news.text: Oil briefly touched $106/barrel — approaching $120 critical threshold. Hormuz blockade driving energy crisis.

latest_news.headline: Tehran power grid struck — electricity knocked out for hours
latest_news.text: US-Israeli strikes hit electricity distribution center supplying eastern Tehran neighborhoods. Power restored after several hours.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 19 02:04) - Global war probability 100%. Seven zones at/near IMMINENT. MAJOR ESCALATION: Israel expands Lebanon ground invasion to multiple axes. Coalition isolation: Germany/Japan/Italy/Australia refuse Hormuz escort, EU refuses maritime expansion. Trump delays China summit. Oil spiked to $106. Tehran power grid targeted. Kataib Hezbollah commander killed. 13 US troops dead. 2,000+ total killed. ZERO ceasefire frameworks in any theater. Western alliance fracturing. Situation continues deteriorating.
